nodes.name: 12:45 PM Trigger (Mon-Fri)
nodes.notes: Fires at 12:45 PM every weekday. Food arrives ~1:30 PM.

nodes.name: Run LLM Decision Engine
nodes.notes: Returns JSON: {status, restaurant_name, item_name, net_total, cart_id, ...}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $env.SLACK_CHANNEL_ID, text: '🍱 ' + $json.item_name + ' from ' + $json.restaurant_name + ' — ₹' + $json.net_total, blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '🍱 AutoLunch — Today's Suggestion' } }, { type: 'section', fields: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Item*
' + $json.item_name }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Restaurant*
' + $json.restaurant_name }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Rating*
' + $json.rating + '⭐ (' + $json.review_count + ' reviews)' }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Distance*
' + $json.distance_km + 'km · ~' + $json.delivery_minutes + 'min' }] }, { type: 'divider' }, { type: 'section', fields: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Base Price*
₹' + $json.base_price }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Delivery*
₹' + $json.delivery_fee + ' (Gold 🥇)' }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Platform + GST*
₹' + (+$json.platform_fee + +$json.gst).toFixed(2) }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*NET TOTAL*
*₹' + $json.net_total + '* ✅' }] }, { type: 'context', elements: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '🤖 _' + $json.reasoning + '_' }] }, { type: 'divider' }, { type: 'actions', block_id: 'lunch_decision', elements: [{ type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '✅ Yes, Order This!' }, style: 'primary', value: 'approve|' + $json.cart_id + '|' + $json.restaurant_name + '|' + $json.restaurant_id + '|' + $json.item_name + '|' + $json.item_id + '|' + $json.base_price + '|' + $json.net_total, action_id: 'autolunch_approve' }, { type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '❌ No, Suggest Again' }, style: 'danger', value: 'reject|' + $json.cart_id + '|' + $json.restaurant_name + '|' + $json.restaurant_id + '|' + $json.item_name + '|' + $json.item_id + '|' + $json.base_price + '|' + $json.net_total, action_id: 'autolunch_reject' }] }] }) }}

nodes.name: Slack Interaction Webhook
nodes.notes: Set this URL in your Slack App → Interactivity → Request URL

nodes.name: Acknowledge Slack (200 OK)
nodes.notes: Slack requires a 200 response within 3 seconds or it retries

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ cart_id: $json.cart_id, restaurant_name: $json.restaurant_name, restaurant_id: $json.restaurant_id, item_name: $json.item_name, item_id: $json.item_id, base_price: $json.base_price }) }}

nodes.name: Trigger Zomato Checkout
nodes.notes: Calls Zomato MCP checkout → returns UPI payment link. Also logs order to memory.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $env.SLACK_CHANNEL_ID, text: '💳 Pay Now — ₹' + $json.amount, blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '💳 Complete Your Payment' } }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Order ID:* `' + $json.order_id + '`
*Amount:* ₹' + $json.amount + '
*Estimated delivery:* ~' + $json.estimated_delivery_minutes + ' minutes

Tap the button below to pay via UPI:' }, accessory: { type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '💰 Pay Now via UPI' }, url: $json.upi_payment_link, style: 'primary', action_id: 'pay_upi' } }, { type: 'context', elements: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '🔒 Secure UPI payment — your PIN is never shared with AutoLunch' }] }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ restaurant_name: $json.restaurant_name, item_name: $json.item_name, cart_id: $json.cart_id, net_total: $json.net_total, reason: 'User declined this suggestion' }) }}

nodes.name: Record Rejection + Re-decide
nodes.notes: Saves rejection to memory + runs decision engine again → returns new suggestion JSON

parameters.jsCode:
// The /reject endpoint returns a new decision result directly
return [{ json: $input.first().json }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $env.SLACK_CHANNEL_ID, text: '🍱 ' + $json.item_name + ' from ' + $json.restaurant_name + ' — ₹' + $json.net_total, blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '🍱 AutoLunch — New Suggestion' } }, { type: 'section', fields: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Item*
' + $json.item_name }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Restaurant*
' + $json.restaurant_name }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Rating*
' + $json.rating + '⭐ (' + $json.review_count + ' reviews)' }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Distance*
' + $json.distance_km + 'km · ~' + $json.delivery_minutes + 'min' }] }, { type: 'divider' }, { type: 'section', fields: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Base Price*
₹' + $json.base_price }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Delivery*
₹' + $json.delivery_fee + ' (Gold 🥇)' }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Platform + GST*
₹' + (+$json.platform_fee + +$json.gst).toFixed(2) }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*NET TOTAL*
*₹' + $json.net_total + '* ✅' }] }, { type: 'context', elements: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '🤖 _' + $json.reasoning + '_' }] }, { type: 'divider' }, { type: 'actions', block_id: 'lunch_decision', elements: [{ type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '✅ Yes, Order This!' }, style: 'primary', value: 'approve|' + $json.cart_id + '|' + $json.restaurant_name + '|' + $json.restaurant_id + '|' + $json.item_name + '|' + $json.item_id + '|' + $json.base_price + '|' + $json.net_total, action_id: 'autolunch_approve' }, { type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '❌ No, Suggest Again' }, style: 'danger', value: 'reject|' + $json.cart_id + '|' + $json.restaurant_name + '|' + $json.restaurant_id + '|' + $json.item_name + '|' + $json.item_id + '|' + $json.base_price + '|' + $json.net_total, action_id: 'autolunch_reject' }] }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $env.SLACK_CHANNEL_ID, text: '⚠️ AutoLunch Error — ' + ($json.message || 'Something went wrong') + '. Please order manually today: https://www.zomato.com/' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $env.SLACK_CHANNEL_ID, text: '⚠️ AutoLunch could not find a new suggestion. Please order manually today: https://www.zomato.com/' }) }}
